raw_consumer_statement:
This complaint is about Citi not doing its due diligence and siding with the merchant on a {$250.00} car rental charge for " smoke/ashes '' without timestamped photo evidence of smoke ( I've never smoked in my life ). 

I rented a car on XX/XX/XXXXXXXX  from XXXX near XXXX XXXX. After returning the rental car, the staff member did not bring up any issues. It was only several days later, when XXXX charged my credit card for {$250.00} claiming there was a strong smell of cigarette smoke in the car I rented. I've never smoked in my life! XX/XX/XXXXXXXX  - I called and emailed XXXX 's parent company and they did not provide any details or documentation. The only response was " We were reviewing your information and when we inspected the car there were cigarette remains in the car and a strong smell, and our agreement indicates that if you smoke inside the car there will be a charge of {$250.00} penalty. '' - I told them I never smoked before in my life and requested documentation or photos which they never provided. They simply stopped responding. XX/XX/XXXX- XX/XX/XXXX - I opened a dispute multiple times with my credit card company, Citi, and they sided with the merchant. Neither Citi nor XXXX responded to my request for photo evidence.
